violations.text: Establishment does not employ an individual with the Rhode Island Food Protection Manager license. Facility has individual with food safety certificate. Establishment must enroll; application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025
Handwashing sinks are lacking the proper notification signage. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use the 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize dishes until unit is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Laminate lining for shelving in kitchen was observed in poor repair; exposing composite wood. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2026

Establishment does not employ an individual with the Rhode Island Food Protection Manager license. Facility has individual with food safety certificate. Establishment must enroll; application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025
Handwashing sinks are lacking the proper notification signage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. dish machine (out of service prior to inspection) 2. plexiglass at heat display for food (observed cracked) 3. handsink in employee restroom out of service prior to inspection (facility is using handsink in breakroom which is at the exterior of employee restroom) 4. grab and go breakfast cooler was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods in unit were recently stocked; All food was in temperature and placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection. No foods to be stored in unit until refrigerator can maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the icemachine have an accumulation of black residue. Equipment to be cleaned at a frequency to prevent accumulation of residue build up. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024
